title: oncidium exalatum
intro: Oncidium exalatum, also known as the Exalted Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its beautiful white and yellow flowers with a distinctive lip. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits of Oncidium exalatum are said to include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as digestive problems and menstrual cramps. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in folk remedies for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
